rows.notes: Description is a combination. 'Rec: An' is clearer than 'Rec: Am', taken from gemini-flash. 'praefensis' from gpt-5-mini is a better visual interpretation of the faded Latin abbreviation than 'presents' from gemini-flash. Final confidence reflects remaining ambiguity in exact spelling.
Visual inspection shows 'Gunmear' as the most plausible reading. Neither extractor fully captured the nuances of the 'm'/'nn' and 'e'/'a' characters. Overriding both descriptions.
